positive: A maximalist celestial garden motif, featuring stylized, deep indigo galaxies swirling around luminous bioluminescent flora. The composition is centrally focused and highly symmetrical, designed for textile printing. Key elements include crescent moons rendered as geometric frames, ornate constellations formed by glowing, fine line work, and exotic, simplified floral silhouettes (like stylized lotus and fern leaves) rendered in gold and teal accents. The overall style is Neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic watercolor, with a rich, saturated color palette that pops with strong contrast. Lighting is ethereal and dramatic, simulating soft glow against a deep midnight background. The final image must have clean, crisp edges and scalable, graphic elements.
negative: low resolution, blurry, fuzzy, jpeg artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy background, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, cropped, amateur, photorealistic, hyperdetailed, realistic people
